checkpoint.summary: unit_048 complete. PHASE_011 CLOSED. skills/development-harness/commands/create.md Phase 2 gained an 'Execution Mode' category with two structured verbatim questions -- Q1 parallelism enable (y/n default n, maps to config.execution_mode.parallelism.enabled with full sub-field defaults), Q2 schema-bump behavior (break/migrate default break, maps to config.execution_mode.versioning.break_on_schema_bump with break->/create-development-harness recovery path called out). A preamble note instructs 'use exact wording' so every install produces the same config shape. Phase 4 Step 2's unit-field list grew from 4 to 7 (added depends_on with 'empty list allowed' note, parallel_safe with the explicit 'Default to false when blast radius is unknown' guidance from the acceptance criterion, touches_paths with 'Propose this per unit' + 'narrower globs' preference). New 'Parallelism-by-default' paragraph below the list instructs aggressive parallel_safe: true proposal when Phase 2 turned parallelism on, with the exact dry-run pipeline + 'when in doubt, leave false' safety net. New test_create_bootstrap_parallelism_questions.py (190 LOC, 11 cases) pins both questions verbatim, both config paths, answer mappings, parallel-execution.md cross-link, and all three new Phase 4 unit fields. PHASE_011 final summary: bugfix_001 (ISSUE_001 Windows Python-detection), bugfix_002 (ISSUE_002 Claude Code Stop-hook retirement), 045 (Parallel Execution Model in architecture.md), 046 (phase-contract parallelism fields + decomposition section), 047 (new parallel-execution.md deep-dive + overlap-reason fix), 048 (create.md Phase 2 + Phase 4 bootstrap flow). pr-review-checklist: all units have validation_evidence; no linter/type errors (stdlib-only); codebase patterns matched; tests pass 285/286 + 1 skip; not deploy-affecting (docs/skill-source repo); phase doc + checkpoint + state current. PHASE_011 marked completed. Suite 228 -> 286. Both tracked issues resolved.
